"'''Tales from Mos Eisley: Light Duty'''" was the first story of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Star Wars: Tales from Mos Eisley|''Tales from Mos Eisley'']]. It was originally printed in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 4|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 4]]. It covers [[Garve]]'s recounting of his assignment to [[Mika (planetoid)|Jellyfish Cove]].
